## Summary / 修改摘要

Describe what changed and why. / 请说明改了什么以及修改原因。

## Validation / 验证方式

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] I tested the relevant example or command. / 已测试相关示例或命令。
- [ ] I updated both README files for user-facing changes. / 若涉及用户功能，已同步更新中英文 README。

## Responsible use / 负责任使用

- [ ] Examples are original, synthetic, or compatibly licensed. / 示例为原创、合成内容，或采用兼容许可证。
- [ ] No private paths, unpublished data, or restricted journal artwork are included. / 未包含私人路径、未公开数据或受限制的期刊图片。
